zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Beauvais於1269年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯時，她的父親Guillaume de Beauvais III34歲，母親Eleonore de Crespin22歲。她於1298年與Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard在法國皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1338年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Beauvais于1269年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯时，她的父亲Guillaume de Beauvais III34岁，母亲Eleonore de Crespin22岁。她于1298年与Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard在法国皮卡迪奧易波奧瓦斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1338年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauvais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Chantelle, Clelie, Denys, Edouard, Germain, Guilene, Laurette, Ludger, Marcel, Michel, Olivier.
French: habitational name from (Le) Beauvais, the name of several places in various parts of France.
History: Jacques Beauvais dit Saint-Gemme from the Perche region of France is recorded in Montreal, QC, in 1654.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Beauvais was born in 1269, in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Guillaume de Beauvais III, was 34 and her mother, Eleonore de Crespin, was 22. She married Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard in 1298, in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1338, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Beauvais est née en 1269, à Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Guillaume de Beauvais III, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Eleonore de Crespin, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard en 1298, à Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1338, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Beauvais 1269 in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Beauvais III 34 und ihre Mutter Eleonore de Crespin 22. Sie hat 1298 in Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1338 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Beauvais è nata il nel 1269 nel Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume de Beauvais III, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Eleonore de Crespin, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard nel 1298, nel Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1338, nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Beauvaisが1269年にフランスピカーディオイゼビーウベイスで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Beauvais IIIは34歳，母Eleonore de Crespinは22歳であった。1298年にフランスピカーディオイゼビーウベイスでJean I De CREQUY L'étandardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1338年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Beauvais(이)가 1269년 프랑스 피카디 이스 보바이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Beauvais III(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleonore de Crespin(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1298년 프랑스 피카디 이스 보바이에서 Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1338년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Beauvais nasceu em 1269, em Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Beauvais III, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Eleonore de Crespin, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard em 1298, em Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1338, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Beauvais родилась в 1269 г. в местности бовеи, оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Beauvais III было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Eleonore de Crespin, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard в 1298 г. в местности бовеи, оис, пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1338 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Beauvais nació en 1269, en Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Beauvais III, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Eleonore de Crespin, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard en 1298, en Beauvais, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1338, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 69 años.
